---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---



```{r}
object <- data.frame(Sample = c("SRR11647685", "SRR11647687", "SRR11647689", "SRR11647695", "SRR11647697", "SRR11647699"), Type = c("Normal", "Normal", "Normal", "Tumor","Tumor","Tumor"), Mapping_Rate = c("96.11", "96.97", "96.54", "95.93", "94.86", "96.89"))

ggplot(object, aes(x=Sample, y=Mapping_Rate, fill=Type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity")+
  labs(title = "Mapping Rate",
       x = "Sample",
       y = "Mapping rate (%)")



```



```{r}

```
